summary: Comprehensive testing of Jantri style batch betting feature completed. All backend APIs (POST /api/bets/batch) and frontend UI features are working correctly.

issues: Frontend uses browser local time for betting status check while backend uses IST - may cause mismatch if user is in different timezone

passed_tests: POST /api/bets/batch returns correct response format (message, total_bets, total_amount, total_potential_win)
POST /api/bets/batch deducts total amount from user balance
Batch bets appear in GET /api/bets user history
UI: Jantri grid displays all 100 jodis (00-99) in 10x10 grid
UI: Quick amount buttons (₹10, ₹50, ₹100, ₹200, ₹500) work correctly
UI: Clicking jodi fills quick amount into that jodi's input
UI: Custom amount can be typed directly in jodi input
UI: Summary bar shows total jodis, total amount, potential win (90x)
UI: Clear all button removes all amounts and hides summary bar
UI: Betting status banner shows OPEN/CLOSED correctly
UI: Place bet button disabled when betting is closed
critical_code_review_comments: Backend batch bet endpoint correctly validates all inputs before processing
Backend uses IST timezone for time-based betting lock
Frontend isBettingOpen() uses browser local time - consider using IST for consistency
All data-testid attributes present for Jantri grid elements
90x multiplier correctly applied for jodi bets
seed_data_creation: Created jantri@test.com user with ₹4800 initial balance for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Jantri batch betting feature fully tested. Backend POST /api/bets/batch accepts {game_id, bet_type, bets: [{number, amount}]} and returns {message, total_bets, total_amount, total_potential_win}. Frontend GamePage.js has Jantri grid with data-testid='jantri-jodi-XX' for jodi buttons and data-testid='jantri-amount-XX' for inputs. Quick amounts use data-testid='quick-amt-XXX'. Summary bar uses data-testid='bet-summary-bar'. Time-based lock uses IST on backend.
